fixes.title: Feedback Analysis: Sparky AI
fixes.feedback_comments:
I was searching for remodels at store 100 and you searched for projects with store in the title. 

Look at the context clues they give you. 

When I manually filtered store 100 and searched for remodel, it gave me 17 projects. 


You: remodel in store 100
😊 Sparky: 🔍 **Found 4 projects matching 'remodel in store 100':** • Activity - Store Support - Practice Card • Avidbots - Non-Auto C Stores • Digital Lock Padlock(Ulock) Full Store Pilot • EXP - Store Speaker Upgrade 📊 **Total:** 375 stores across these projects 🎯 Dashboard is now filtered to these results! 💡 **Tip:** Type a specific project name for more details.
✓ Filters Applied:
Search: store

fixes.title: UI/Visual Issue
fixes.feedback_comments:
I want to see a list of all the projects in store 5260 and asked: "You: Can you show me all the projects in store 5260 😊 Sparky: ❌ **No projects found** for Store 5260. This store may not have any active projects currently, or the data may not include this store number. 💡 **Try:** Searching for a project name, or check if the store number is correct. 

 When I search manually there are 21 projects
fixes.root_cause: User interface element not behaving as expected. Need to identify specific element and expected vs actual behavior.
fixes.resolution: Identify specific UI element from feedback. Review CSS styling and JavaScript event handlers. Test across browsers.
investigation_notes: Active filters at time of feedback: {'store': ['5260']}

fixes.title: Feedback Analysis: Sparky AI
fixes.feedback_comments:
I asked: You: how many stores is 2 Hour Picking SLA Test in?
😊 Sparky: 🔍 **Found 2 projects matching 'HOUR SLA + Test Phase':** • 2 Hour Picking SLA Test • Faster Unscheduled Pickup for Customers (2 Hour Unscheduled Pickup in Supercenters) 📊 **Total:** 609 stores across these projects 🎯 Applied filters: • Project: HOUR SLA • Phase: Test 💡 **Tip:** Type a specific project name for more details.
✓ Filters Applied:
Search: hour sla
Phase: Test

Why did it add Phase Test criteria when the title of the project is "2 Hour Picking SLA Test"
